content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory architectures can be repurposed to create 'curiosity-gated memory compression' for DeepResearch Agents, where only high-uncertainty, paradigm-challenging research findings are retained in long-term memory, while incremental or confirmatory results are compressed into low-resolution summary embeddings. This design leverages the same uncertainty-based sample selection that powers modern active learning memory to help DeepResearch Agents avoid catastrophic knowledge overload when exploring open-ended scientific problems.
